排名 #1 · 关键词命中 · 语义相似度高: Rank #1 · keyword hit · high semantic similarity
你购买的「...」已经到周期了,要不要再来一单?: The item you bought is due — reorder?
两次新密码不一致: The two new passwords don't match
下次请用新密码登录。: Use your new password next time.
先去聊天里挑几款商品吧 ✨: Pick a few products in chat first ✨
部分外币汇率暂不可用，未计入人民币合计: Some foreign-currency rates are unavailable and aren't included in the CNY total
商品按 Frankfurter 参考汇率统一换算到此币种结算。: Prices are converted to this currency using Frankfurter reference rates.
在商品卡片或详情页点 ❤️ 收藏,这里随时回看。: Tap ❤️ on any product card or detail page to save it here.
邀 N 人拼单立省 15%: Invite N people to group-buy and save 15%
已复制 · 粘贴到微信发给好友: Copied · paste into WeChat to share with friends
邀请好友 · 复制拼单邀请: Invite friends · copy the group-buy invite
演示：为展示拼单玩法，名额会随时间由模拟「邻居」自动加入；本 App 无真实社交: Demo: to show how group-buy works, slots fill over time via simulated "neighbors". This app has no real social backend and places no real orders.
演示下单:不接入真实支付,仅记录购买用于复购提醒。: Demo order: no real payment; we only log the purchase for reorder reminders.
📦 翻箱倒柜帮你找好物…: 📦 Digging through the shelves for you…
✨ AI 思考中,请勿按地球的快进键: ✨ AI is thinking — please don't fast-forward the planet
🛒 让狮子去逛逛淘宝再回来: 🛒 Sending the lion off to browse the shops…
📚 翻一下产品手册先: 📚 Flipping through the product manual first
🦴 别催,狮子在啃骨头思考: 🦴 Don't rush — the lion's chewing it over
🐾 狮爪轻点屏幕,马上呈现: 🐾 A tap of the paw — coming right up
🔍 放大镜里全是答案: 🔍 The answer's under the magnifying glass
登录后,你的偏好 / 收藏 / 拼单 跟着账号走: Sign in and your preferences / favorites / group-buys follow your account
请输入有效的邮箱(含 @)或手机号(≥6 位数字): Enter a valid email (with @) or phone number (≥6 digits)
密码至少 6 位: Password must be at least 6 characters
已有账号? 直接登录: Already have an account? Sign in
无需短信验证,直接注册 + 密码登录。密码本地以 PBKDF2-SHA256 哈: No SMS needed — sign up and log in with a password. Passwords are hashed locally with PBKDF2-SHA256.
演示后端不发送真实短信:验证码直接显示在上方,输入即可登录。生产环境由云端短信服: The demo backend sends no real SMS: the code is shown above — enter it to sign in. Production delivers it via a cloud SMS service.
演示版:真实微信授权需企业资质 + 官方 SDK + 审核;生产环境接入同一接口: Demo: real WeChat auth needs a business account + official SDK + review; production uses the same endpoint.
无法读取 Apple 身份令牌: Couldn't read the Apple identity token
登录解锁拼单 + 跨设备偏好: Sign in to unlock group-buy + cross-device preferences
登录后,拼单、收藏、偏好都跟着账号走。浏览和聊天始终免登录。: Once signed in, your group-buys, favorites and preferences follow your account. Browsing and chat never require sign-in.
⚠️ 此商品为演示数据。外部链接为商品标题搜索。: ⚠️ This product is demo data. The external link searches for the title.
说明: 越靠前(数字小)越相关。语义检索抓「意思」, 关键词检索抓「字面」, 精: Note: a smaller number = more relevant. Semantic search captures meaning, keyword search captures wording, and the reranker (a cross-encoder) does the final re-ordering.
当该商品价格 ≤ 你设置的目标价,我们会在你下次打开 App 时提醒你。: When this product's price drops to your target or below, we'll remind you next time you open the app.
请输入大于 0 的目标价: Enter a target price greater than 0
将删除你的账号及其偏好 / 收藏 / 拼单数据,不可恢复。: This permanently deletes your account and its preferences / favorites / group-buy data.
还没有收藏。在任意商品卡片点 ❤️ 即可收藏,这里随时回看。: No favorites yet. Tap ❤️ on any product card to save it, and find it here anytime.
点卡片上的 ❤️ 可取消收藏。: Tap ❤️ on a card to remove it from favorites.
还没有偏好。在商品详情页点 👍 / 👎 即可训练。: No preferences yet. Tap 👍 / 👎 on a product page to train them.
你的 👍 / 👎 会轻微调整后续推荐排序。登录后跟随账号(未来云端跨设备),可一: Your 👍 / 👎 gently adjust future ranking. Once signed in they follow your account (cloud cross-device later), and you can clear them anytime.
还没有拼单。在商品详情页发起「拼单」即可。: No group-buys yet. Start one from any product page.
你发起的拼单。名额由模拟「邻居」随时间加入(演示),拼满即可去结算。: Group-buys you've started. Slots fill over time via simulated "neighbors" (demo); check out once full.
当前登录方式无密码,注销无需密码确认。: Your current sign-in method has no password, so deletion needs no password confirmation.
试试问：\n推荐一款适合油皮的洗面奶\n或者上传 / 拍一张商品照片:
Try asking:
Recommend a face wash for oily skin
or upload / snap a product photo
切换后整个 App 立即生效,包括导购助手的回复语言。: Applies to the whole app immediately — including the assistant's reply language.
默认走公网 Cloudflare 隧道,不需要配置 LAN IP。切换为本地后端: Routes through the public Cloudflare Tunnel by default — no LAN IP needed. Change here only to point at a different backend.
开启后,助手回复的第一段会自动朗读。仍可手动点喇叭重读其他段落。: When on, the assistant's first paragraph is read aloud automatically; tap the speaker to replay other paragraphs.
命中率 (hit rate) 越高,意味着更多查询命中缓存、首字延迟越低。: A higher hit rate means more queries are served from the in-memory cache, lowering first-token latency. Source: GET /cache/stats.
演示后端不发真实邮件/短信:重置码直接显示在上方,输入即可重置。生产环境由云端下: The demo backend sends no real email/SMS — the reset code is shown above; enter it to reset. Production delivers it from the cloud.
需后端设置 LIONPICK_ADMIN_TOKEN 环境变量;未设置时接口返回: Requires the backend env var LIONPICK_ADMIN_TOKEN; the API returns 503 if unset. Swipe left to delete a user.
演示用模拟下单。No real payment. No real shippin: Simulated demo order. No real payment. No real shipping.
感谢使用 狮选 LionPick ✨\n商品将由 AAALion 物流团队配送（:
Thanks for using LionPick ✨
Your order ships via the AAALion logistics team (demo).
Sign in with Apple 需付费开发者账号方可启用,免费开发者账号会: Sign in with Apple needs a paid developer account; free accounts fail. For the demo, use Password sign-in.
